item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
it will never happen because I have fun memes that someone always seems to get upset about. meh. did a lil hd2 last night and got next warbond unlocked. so might do a lil more a couple nights this week. otherwise the alters is still eating my time and after inc is coming out tomorrow. so kinda excited for that one too. mmm games. finding my want to game again will interest thing. it is monday. hopefully everyone had a fantastic weekend. enjoy some memes!
secret potatoes.
oh boy.
...
...
balancing a lot of fill the void things rn.
...
coffeee. trying to cut back and also then its caffeine withdrawal headaches...
...
...
...
mhmm. and also stuffies.
yup.
...
yup yup. and potatoes. and memes.
I love being me. sometimes I really hate the whole human body thing and emotions things and well. all the fun trauma things that I am slowly trying to work through in my brain that sometimes leak out onto other people which I am trying not to do.
yup. not doing that again for a while. if ever again. fun for me now please.
had a taste of this and never had it last very long.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We will be doing DnD things in the future here shortly. Will be interesting. So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 "I stand before you as a tower of strength, the weight of the world on my shoulders. As you pass through my life, look, but not too close, for I fear I will expose the vulnerable me." -Deidra Sarault "We tend to think of the rational as a higher order, but it is the emotional that marks our lives. One often learns more from ten days of agony than from ten years of contentment." -Merle Shain "My lifetime listens to yours." -Muriel Rukeyser "What people really need is a good listening to." Mary Lou Casey "For many years I was so flexible I didn't know who I was, and now that I'm discovering who I am, I think "OK, I know where I stand on that issue. Now on to the next one." But I have to remind myself that all issues are interrelated---no one is separate." -Kathleen Casey Theisen I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #deliciousness #potato #memes #dailydirties
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Gaming Megadump!
item.description:
good ol' Nebezial.
EDIT: Monday Frontpage!! Thanks a lot Imgurians! I wish you a nice week and remember to take care of your mental health! I do some reviews as a hobby, this week I was "Like a Dragon: Ishin!", you can check it here https://youtu.be/CkDkcZh_z2k and if you're interested in my other reviews, check https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/

item.title: We finally got to see what an Olympic athlete vs normal people would look like
item.description: At the age of 38, Jamaican track and field sprinter Shelly-Ann Fraser-Pryce, who is a two-time Olympic gold medalist and a five-time world champion, competed with other parents during sports day at her son’s school.

this is the guy who wants to clone people btw
NO KINGS, ONLY QUEENS!
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!

item.title: Yvette Hoffman, who was shot eight times by Vance Boelter just shared this photo from her hospital bed. She shielded her daughter from Boelter to save her life.

item.title: The 521st vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 11
item.description:
This is what we're fighting for. A better world.
We will not stand by
We will not be quiet
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse (The Stable) and PotatoCheesMonk's (Deviousness) Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. https://discord.gg/JoinTheStable https://discord.gg/Deviousness These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk. @PlanckEraWasMyBestEra also has a server for Parents who are Trans https://discord.gg/transparents
We will fight
I hope this is real
Fukkin Dave
Young Homo Love
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.dc:creator: Sweenerd

item.title: What Happened Today #136
item.description: Sunday’s uneasy breath: Trump flaunts force with unprecedented deployment of tankers in the sky, ICE sweeps for blue cities, and a $45 million parade bankrolled by corporate pals, yet walls literally crumble, allies slap back, and resistance reloads for tomorrow. The harder he squeezes, the clearer it becomes that his power survives only if we stay silent. Meanwhile, don’t rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what’s going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today or at Substack under Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/refueling-tankers-deployed 2. https://go.govbrief.today/us-might-get-involved 3. https://go.govbrief.today/boelter-arrested 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-dont-kill-leader 5. https://go.govbrief.today/macron-visits-greenland 6. https://go.govbrief.today/australian-blogger-detained 7. https://go.govbrief.today/prioritize-deportation-democratic-run-cities 8. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-escapees-captured 9. https://go.govbrief.today/corporate-sponsors-military-parade Yesterday's Story - https://go.govbrief.today/culpeper-car-attack Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/nokings-post-call Free GovBrief Subscription - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
